payload.title: FINANCE COMMITTEE
payload.description: MTA Finance Committee document summarizing actions including TBTA toll revenue resolution, vendor contracts, real estate transactions, and lease agreements
MTA Bridges and Tunnels (TBTA) - seeking Board ratification of CRZ Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution
MTA Headquarters - contracting agency for EAM consulting, fleet management, and fare payment system contracts
Vendor for MTA New Fare Payment System - modification to procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale (CS POS) Terminals
MTA Finance Department seeking TBTA Board ratification of the CRZ Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution
MTA Real Estate department handling sale of Eastern Rail Yard TDRs, GCT event fee policy amendment, and lease/license agreements
Vendor for MTA Fleet Management Services contract
Purchaser of Eastern Rail Yard transferable development rights (ERY TDRs) via 517 West 35th LLC
Lessor for MTA Government and Community Relations Office Space at 111 Washington Avenue, Albany, NY
Lessor for NYCT facility at 27-35 Jackson Avenue, Long Island City, NY
Lessee for retail space at Long Beach Station, Long Beach, NY - travel convenience retail operation
Lessor for LIRR Employee Assistance Program at 300 Old Country Road, Suite 103, Mineola, NY
Lessor for property for storage and parking under the viaduct in Valley Stream, NY
MTA Finance Committee meeting in November 2025 covering TBTA toll revenue resolution, vendor contracts, real estate transactions, and lease agreements
Retainer contract award to 17 consulting firms for EAM Program support

tool_args.label: TBTA CRZ Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution

payload.claim_text: The MTA Finance Department is seeking MTA Bridges and Tunnels ('TBTA') Board ratification of the previously approved annexed Congestion Relief Zone ('CRZ') Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution.
payload.subject: MTA Finance Department
payload.description: TBTA Board ratification of CRZ Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution

payload.claim_text: Retainer contract award to 17 consulting firms to provide as-needed technical and management consulting services in support of MTA's Enterprise Asset Management ('EAM') Program.
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Award to 17 vendors for EAM Program consulting

payload.claim_text: Contract for Fleet Management Services; Modification to (1) extend the contract for eight months in order to ensure continuation of the fleet maintenance service program during the current Request for Proposal process to award a replacement contract; and (2) procure additional funding.
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Eight-month extension of fleet management contract during RFP process

tool_args.label: New Fare Payment System CS POS Terminals

payload.claim_text: Contract for New Fare Payment System; Modification to procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale (CS POS) Terminals.
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Procurement of 30 CS POS Terminals for New Fare Payment System

tool_args.label: Sale of Eastern Rail Yard TDRs

payload.claim_text: Sale of Eastern Rail Yard transferrable development rights to Related Companies L.P. 517 West 35th LLC c/o Related Companies L.P. ('Purchaser')
payload.subject: MTA Real Estate
payload.description: Approval of policies and procedures for ERY TDR sale and approval of sale terms

tool_args.label: Amend GCT Event Fee Schedule Policy

payload.claim_text: To obtain MTA Board approval to amend the Policy Governing Event Fee Schedule by replacing the current GCT Vanderbilt Hall Rental Rates Fee Schedule with a fee structure reflecting the current marketplace for event venues
payload.subject: MTA Real Estate
payload.description: Amendment of Grand Central Terminal event fee schedule policy

payload.claim_text: Authorization to enter into a new lease with 111 Washington Avenue, LLC for office space, parking, and storage
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: New lease for MTA Government and Community Relations Office Space at 111 Washington Avenue, Albany, NY

tool_args.label: 27-35 Jackson Ave NYCT Facility Lease Extension

payload.claim_text: Approval to execute renewal amendment for office space to house NYCT's Assistant Chief Transportation Officers and Subdivision Construction Flagging personnel
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Extension of lease with 27-35 Jackson Ave LLC for NYCT facility at 27-35 Jackson Avenue, Long Island City, NY

payload.claim_text: Authorization to enter into a lease agreement for a travel convenience retail operation
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Lease with Muhammad Afzal for retail space at Long Beach Station, Long Beach, NY

payload.claim_text: Authorization to enter into a lease renewal agreement in support of the EAP program requirements
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Lease renewal (part 3) with Alzamora Commercial Holdings LLC for LIRR Employee Assistance Program at Mineola, NY

payload.claim_text: Authorization to enter into a license agreement with Libla for parking and storage of heating, air conditioning, and maintenance of equipment
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: License with Libla Realty Corp for storage and parking under the viaduct in Valley Stream, NY
